stemHtml: On a transport aircraft equipped with integrated drive generators (IDGs), how is the AC generator disconnected during normal operation?

options.a: By selecting the corresponding GEN switch OFF, which opens the generator line contractor.
options.b: By pressing the IDG DISC switch to remove the generator from the accessory gearbox.
options.c: It cannot be manually disconnected in flight; it only trips automatically vie the GCU.
